name: Multi-Database Connectivity
description: Connect and query multiple database types: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, Neo4j, and SQLite. Connection pooling, query routing, cross-database joins, migration patterns.
prompt: Connect and query multiple database types: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, Neo4j, and SQLite. Connection pooling, query routing, cross-database joins, migration patterns, and TypeScript ORM integrations.
